titleStmt.title: SII 5.766: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 766. (A.R. No. 202 of 1895). ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE SAME SHRINE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
subhamastu . sandhāryametat satatam samastasuramaulibhiśśāsanam śrīkulaśekharanāthasya śaṁbhorjayati śāśvatam . Ādicaṇḍeśvarā
jñeyam . śakābdam 1000 4 100 8 10 9 lmel cellāniṉṟa svastaśrī kojaṭilavarmmarāna tribhuvanaccakra vatti konermaikoṇṭāṉ śrīperumāḷ
Aḻakaṉperumāḷ Ativīrarāmaṉ śrīvallabha tevaṟku yāṇṭu Añcāvatu piṟapava varuṣam Āvaṇi ṭṭam 2 10 Aparapakṣastu
tiṟitikaiyum cukkiṟavāramum keṇṭayokamum vaṇikkaraṇamum peṟṟa Uttiraṭṭāti nāḷ nam Ālai
yattukku toṇṭarkaḷ māṭāpattiyak kāṇiyāṭcaiyum toṇṭarkaḷ meppaṭi kaṇakkum kāṇiyāṭcaiyum Āka
kāṇiyāṉa viśvanātha mutalikku kuṭukka kaṟpittu nam kumāran Aḻakaṉperumāḷ Ativīrarāmaṉa śrīval labhadevan Olai nam vā
cat turaṟkkāṟarkku varaviṭukaiyil nam vācaṟkāriyam tirunelvelipperumāḷ kāliṅkarāyaṉum nam Aṟcakaril parākkiṟa
mapāṇṭiyapaṭṭaṉum Ālaiyakkaṇakku caṅkaranayiṉāṉum Iṭṭa kaittaṭippaṭikku kāḷaiyāṉ viśvanātha mutalikku
toṇṭarkaḷkaṇakku kāṇiyāṭcai Iṟaiyiliāka viṭṭa nilam Orumāvukku vaṭavārināṭṭup parākkiṟamapāṇṭiyappereri
paṭṭāvil nam kaṇṭuḻavu tiṟantu Ivvaruṣam kār mutalukku Iṟaiyiliyāka viṭṭa cekavīrarāmaṉ tiruttu naṭu
l viti 7- ṅ kkaṟu kiḻelkai civalapārati tāṉaiṟaiyilikku meṟku teṉelkai Āṇṭi vāṇātarāyaṉukku A
Iṟaiyiliyāka viṭṭa nilattukku vaṭakku melelkai meṟpaṭiyāṉ Iṟaiyilikkum teṉvaṭal Oṭiya kālukkum kiḻakku vaṭavelkai
tāṉaiṟaiyilikku teṟku Āka Iṉṉāṉ kelkaik kuḷpaṭṭa �2 10 6 � 2 10- ṅ kkaṟu kiḻelkai
maṭattukkum teṉvaṭal Oṭiya kālukkum meṟku teṉelkai pāṭṭattukku vaṭakku melelkai teṉvaṭa loṭi
lukkum pāṭṭattukkut tekku vaṭaelkai kiḻme(l) loṭiya kā(l)lukkum pāṭṭattukkum teṟku Āka Iṉṉāṉ kelkaik kuṭpaṭṭa
viti 2- ṅkkaṟu kiḻelkai pāṭṭattukku meṟku teṉelkai taṉatu Iṟaiyilikku vaṭakku melelkai coḻakoṉperuṅkā
kiḻakku vaṭaelkai pāṭṭattukku teṟku Āka Iṉṉāṉ kelkaikku Uḷpaṭṭa � 2 10 4 kkaṟu kiḻelkai tirunelvelipperumāḷ I
kku meṟku teṉelkai kiḻme loṭiya kālukku vaṭakku melelkai teṉvaṭa loṭiya kālukku kiḻakku vaṭaelkai taṉatu Iṟaiyili
ṟku Āka Iṉṉāṉ kelkaik kuḷpaṭṭa � 10 7 kkaṟu kiḻelkai civalapārati Iṟaiyilikku meṟku teṉelkai pilāṟṟu
me loṭiya kālukku vaṭakku melelkai teṉvaṭa loṭiya kālukku kiḻakku vaṭavelkai civalapārati tāṉaiṟaiyilikkum kiḻme
�ṭiya kālukkum teṟku Āka Iṉṉāṉ kelkaikkuṭpaṭṭa � 2 10 � Āka viṭṭa Iṉnilam nāṉmāvum maṉai Oṉṟu ku viṭṭa
llūril caṉṉatitteru Elkaikku ṉukku viṭṭa ma
meṟku teṉelkai caṉṉatitteruvukku vaṭakku melelkai vatikku kiḻakku
nārācattukku teṟku Āka Iṉṉāṉ kelkaik kuḷpaṭṭa pattu muḻattu maṉai Oṉṟum maṉainer toṭṭamum toṭṭakkūṟum nir
tukku picātam Irunāḻiyum mātam Oṉṟukku Uṭaimai paṇama muṉṟum nelk koṭṭai muṉṟum Acalkkaṇakkiṉukku Otta pala cuvanti
m toṇṭarkaḷ māṭāpattiyam kāṇiyāṭcaikku nāḷ Oṉṟukku picātam Irunāḻiyum mātam Oṉṟukku Uṭaimai paṇam muṉṟu
kku paṇam muṉṟum maṟṟum pala cuvantiraṅkaḷum Iṉṉāḷ mutalukku kāṇiāṭcai Iṟaiyiliyākak kaiyāḷumpaṭikku
mutalukku nām koḷḷum muṟaipāṭāka Uḷḷa Eṟpeṟapaṭṭatum nam variyuḷār kaṇakkilum tavirttuk kāṇi
yākak kaṇakkum Eḻutikkoṇṭu māṭāpattiyamum keṭṭukkoṇṭu Ācantirāṟkam cantatippiṟavecame Iṟaiyi
paṇa Uṭaimai nellu Uṭaimai maṉai Eṟppeṟpaṭṭatum kāṇiyāṭcaiyākak kallilum cempilum veṭṭik kaiyāṇ
ḷḷavum pāṟka Ivai koṭumaḷuruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Āditaśaṇḍeśvara Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 5.766 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
